before_code:
/* ADC Peripheral Register Map - adc_regs.h */
#ifndef ADC_REGS_H
#define ADC_REGS_H

#include <stdint.h>

typedef volatile struct {
    uint32_t CR1;     /* Control Register 1   offset 0x00 */
    uint32_t CR2;     /* Control Register 2   offset 0x04 */
    uint32_t SMPR;    /* Sample Time Register offset 0x08 */
    uint32_t DR;      /* Data Register        offset 0x0C */
    uint32_t SR;      /* Status Register      offset 0x10 */
} ADC_Regs_t;

#define ADC1  ((ADC_Regs_t *) 0x40012400U)
#define ADC2  ((ADC_Regs_t *) 0x40012800U)

#define ADC_CR1_SCAN_EN   (1U << 8)
#define ADC_CR2_ADON      (1U << 0)
#define ADC_SR_EOC        (1U << 1)

#endif /* ADC_REGS_H */
after_code:
/* ADC Peripheral Register Map - adc_regs.h */
#ifndef ADC_REGS_H
#define ADC_REGS_H

#include <stdint.h>

/* BREAKING: SMPR split into SMPR1 and SMPR2; DR and SR shift by one slot.
   Any code accessing DR or SR via fixed offsets or positional struct
   casting will read/write wrong registers silently. */
typedef volatile struct {
    uint32_t CR1;     /* Control Register 1    offset 0x00 */
    uint32_t CR2;     /* Control Register 2    offset 0x04 */
    uint32_t SMPR1;   /* Sample Time Reg 1     offset 0x08 */
    uint32_t SMPR2;   /* Sample Time Reg 2     offset 0x0C */
    uint32_t DR;      /* Data Register         offset 0x10 */
    uint32_t SR;      /* Status Register       offset 0x14 */
} ADC_Regs_t;

#define ADC1  ((ADC_Regs_t *) 0x40012400U)
#define ADC2  ((ADC_Regs_t *) 0x40012800U)

#define ADC_CR1_SCAN_EN   (1U << 8)
#define ADC_CR2_ADON      (1U << 0)
#define ADC_SR_EOC        (1U << 1)

#endif /* ADC_REGS_H */
patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -4,12 +4,16 @@
 
 #include <stdint.h>
 
+/* BREAKING: SMPR split into SMPR1 and SMPR2; DR and SR shift by one slot.
+   Any code accessing DR or SR via fixed offsets or positional struct
+   casting will read/write wrong registers silently. */
 typedef volatile struct {
-    uint32_t CR1;     /* Control Register 1   offset 0x00 */
-    uint32_t CR2;     /* Control Register 2   offset 0x04 */
-    uint32_t SMPR;    /* Sample Time Register offset 0x08 */
-    uint32_t DR;      /* Data Register        offset 0x0C */
-    uint32_t SR;      /* Status Register      offset 0x10 */
+    uint32_t CR1;     /* Control Register 1    offset 0x00 */
+    uint32_t CR2;     /* Control Register 2    offset 0x04 */
+    uint32_t SMPR1;   /* Sample Time Reg 1     offset 0x08 */
+    uint32_t SMPR2;   /* Sample Time Reg 2     offset 0x0C */
+    uint32_t DR;      /* Data Register         offset 0x10 */
+    uint32_t SR;      /* Status Register       offset 0x14 */
 } ADC_Regs_t;
 
 #define ADC1  ((ADC_Regs_t *) 0x40012400U)
